content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — quid-pro-quo review incentive in paywall: "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" (App/PaywallView.swift:10)
Pierre: Apple prohibits offering compensation for reviews or steering users toward a specific star rating, as it manipulates App Store ratings. The paywall footnote explicitly trades a 5-star review for free Premium time, which may trigger review questions or rejection under 2.3.9. Remove the incentive copy and, if you want ratings, use `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview` with no reward attached.
